name: [FUTURE] Hire the first virtual assistant
description: PLACEHOLDER — when revenue is consistently >$X/month and Jed's time-on-build is still >Y hrs/week, Solomon flags the hiring milestone. From the Solomon Phase 10 roadmap (org director).
trigger_examples: should I get help with the inbox
solomon, do we need a person yet
prompt_template: Pass to Nathan with context='Current trailing revenue: {{ttm_revenue}}, current Jed hours/week on Shultz Enterprises: {{jed_hours}}'. Nathan considers whether a VA is justified given debt snowball priority. Solomon relays Nathan's recommendation + a draft job description if go-ahead.
escalation_conditions: always — hiring is a financial commitment, Jed signs off
notes: FUTURE — Solomon Phase 10 (organizational director). Hiring decisions go through Nathan first for sanity check, then Jed.
